name: 图像处理
description: 使用 PIL/Pillow 处理图像（调整大小、转换格式等）
script:
# 图像处理示例
from PIL import Image
import io
import base64

# 获取图像数据（base64 或路径）
image_data = inputs.get('image_data', '')
operation = inputs.get('operation', 'resize')

try:
    if image_data.startswith('data:'):
        # 移除 data URL 前缀
        image_data = image_data.split(',')[1]
    
    # 解码图像
    image_bytes = base64.b64decode(image_data)
    img = Image.open(io.BytesIO(image_bytes))
    
    outputs['original_size'] = img.size
    outputs['format'] = img.format
    outputs['mode'] = img.mode
    
    if operation == 'resize':
        new_width = inputs.get('width', 800)
        new_height = inputs.get('height', 600)
        img_resized = img.resize((new_width, new_height), Image.Resampling.LANCZOS)
        outputs['new_size'] = img_resized.size
        
        # 保存为 PNG
        buffer = io.BytesIO()
        img_resized.save(buffer, format='PNG')
        outputs['processed_image'] = 'data:image/png;base64,' + base64.b64encode(buffer.getvalue()).decode()
    
    elif operation == 'grayscale':
        img_gray = img.convert('L')
        buffer = io.BytesIO()
        img_gray.save(buffer, format='PNG')
        outputs['grayscale_image'] = 'data:image/png;base64,' + base64.b64encode(buffer.getvalue()).decode()
    
    elif operation == 'rotate':
        angle = inputs.get('angle', 90)
        img_rotated = img.rotate(angle, expand=True)
        outputs['rotated_size'] = img_rotated.size
        
        buffer = io.BytesIO()
        img_rotated.save(buffer, format='PNG')
        outputs['rotated_image'] = 'data:image/png;base64,' + base64.b64encode(buffer.getvalue()).decode()
    
except Exception as e:
    outputs['error'] = str(e)
